business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

positives: Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
No OSHA citations in the past 3 years
24 years in business with 18 years of consistent current management
Building fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
concerns: No formal safety program in place
EV charging stations installed on premises (potential fire exposure)
Swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities present (additional liability exposure)
Older buildings in portfolio (LOC-006 built 1995, LOC-002 built 2001)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 2 claims over the past 3 years (1 in 2024, 0 in 2023, 1 in 2022). No cancellations in the prior 3-year period.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas. Hours of Operation: Mon-Sat 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM. 145 full-time and 28 part-time employees.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: No formal safety program. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors and subcontractors. Buildings fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R with hard-wired fire alarms on central station monitoring. 24-hour doorperson/security on premises. No OSHA citations in past 3 years.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior 3-year loss history: 2024 CNA Financial ($414,601.77 premium, 1 claim); 2023 Zurich Insurance Group ($423,914.72 premium, 0 claims); 2022 American International Group ($447,842.42 premium, 1 claim). No cancellations.
